candidates.minimal_topology: Diffused grid transitioning to heavily centralized star.
candidates.falsifier: System remains evenly distributed despite distance collapse; no decision funnel forms.

candidates.minimal_topology: Ring topology enclosing an inner lattice.
candidates.falsifier: Signal injected at boundary ring decays faster than signal shot directly across the center.

candidates.minimal_topology: Binary contested network with threshold bridges.
candidates.falsifier: The system degrades linearly without any elastic mathematical reversal snapping into place.
